form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of ten weeks and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign to post a big 4.5 len win. This track January 30 over 1700m defeating Dark Soul with 57.5kg at $1.80. Previously first up; third of 18 at Osmangazi October 24 over 1400m, soft track; 1.5 len behind King Pisa with 56kg at $8.20. Anticipating a bright start to this prep.
